title: stelis peduncularis
intro: Stelis peduncularis, also known as the Monkey Brush, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Stelis peduncularis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Stelis peduncularis is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves can be crushed and applied topically to wounds, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
